title: Scurz PvP
description:
High Performance Sodium Client made with extensive Client-side optimizations and QoL features.

This Modpack has been custom built for PvP.
body:
## 📝 Description
The Scurz PvP modpack aims to provide a base of the best optimization mods available, configured for the maximum performance achievable, specifically for combat related purposes. Thanks to countless hours of research, it often outperforms other optimization solutions in benchmarks, and when it doesn't, our team investigates why to improve it further.

Scurz PvP was constructed with combat and optimizations in mind first. This modpack disables many features in vanilla Minecraft to drastically improve framerates (such as disabling the lighting engine). This modpack also adds many lightweight quality of life improvements to gain every small advantage in combat.

This also means the Scurz PvP modpack is rigorously tested with new cutting-edge performance improvements, and can update to new major Minecraft versions with the best optimizations available. The team strives to keep this modpack as relevant as it can be at any given moment.

## 📈 Performance Benchmarks
The below performance benchmarks display our combat-centered modpack compared with other leading performance optimization modpacks.

### Scurz PvP (2233 FPS) - With QoL Feature Mods
![Scurz PvP Performance Benchmark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75a8c5589f719518acd9b757ad293df9748f63fa.png)
### Fabulously Optimized (1785 FPS)
![Fabulously Optimized Performance Benchmark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f11c4e8d8cc40e78136a35c89e14170a5266b0b.png)
### Simply Optimized (2267 FPS)
![Simply Optimized Performance Benchmark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86bc99fc738870a7f9d0c7524efa5fd8ce341dd8.png)
### Adrenaline (2117 FPS)
![Adrenaline Performance Benchmark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c60f6a16030edaaf133d808963d5bd2a8414059.png)
